description: chop cuts the message into size-length pieces with a shorter leftover at the end; packet_count returns how many pieces; reassemble joins the pieces back into the original message.
An empty message gives zero packets (chop -> [], packet_count -> 0); a message shorter than one packet gives a single short packet; reassemble([]) is the empty string.
packet_count reuses chop instead of re-counting by hand; clear names; a return on every path.
